meta.hw1f_calibration_note: Bloomberg screenshot shows HW1F and normal-vol VCUB inputs but does not show mean reversion. Kappa is an explicit fixed calibration assumption; sigma is the HW1F short-rate absolute volatility derived from the visible caplet normal-vol strip rather than tuned to expected_outputs.
meta.hw1f_param_routing: kappa and sigma are supplied to the cap/floor HW1F tree via the dedicated spec.pricing_overrides.hw1f_mean_reversion and hw1f_sigma fields (the short-rate channel the pricer consumes), not market_quotes.implied_volatility.
meta.hw1f_source_quote: VCUB USD RFR BVOL Cube visible 5Y tenor caplet normal-vol strip transcribed in inputs.market.surfaces[USD-RFR-BVOL-CUBE-5Y].vols_row_major
